subtitle: Community Rideshare for Maryland
shortDescription: People-Governed, community-owned rideshare. Verified neighbors, fair fares, no surge.
fullDescription:
PG Ride is a People-Governed, community-owned rideshare platform. PG means People-Governed — mobility governed by the people who use it.

• No surge pricing — fares based on distance and time only
• Verified drivers with live tracking and SOS safety features
• Virtual PG Card for easy payments
• Choose trusted drivers from your community
• Driver ownership program with profit sharing

Founded in Maryland, built for communities everywhere. Ride with neighbors — not strangers.
